zh.Blain, Châteaubriant, Loire-Atlantique,: 法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易洛易-阿特藍可a奧布利藍特布萊
zh.Clisson, Loire-Atlantique, Pays de la Lo: 法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易洛易-阿特藍可可利頌
zh.lifeSummary: 當Olivier IV de Clisson於1300年出生在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易洛易-阿特藍可可利頌時，他的父親Olivier III de Clisson36歲，母親Isabelle de Craon22歲。他於大約1320年與Blanche de Bouville在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易洛易-阿特藍可可利頌結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1343年8月2日在法國瑟芭黎絲享年43歲。

zh-hans.Blain, Châteaubriant, Loire-Atlantique,: 法国帕斯 德 拉 洛易洛易-阿特藍可a奧布利藍特布萊
zh-hans.Clisson, Loire-Atlantique, Pays de la Lo: 法国帕斯 德 拉 洛易洛易-阿特藍可可利頌
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Olivier IV de Clisson于1300年出生在法国帕斯 德 拉 洛易洛易-阿特藍可可利頌时，他的父亲Olivier III de Clisson36岁，母亲Isabelle de Craon22岁。他于大约1320年与Blanche de Bouville在法国帕斯 德 拉 洛易洛易-阿特藍可可利頌结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1343年8月2日在法国瑟芭黎絲享年43岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Clisson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: from a pet form of the personal name Closs, an old variant of Claus , a name of German and Flemish (Dutch) origin.

variants.name: Clawson
meanings: Americanized form of North German, Danish, and Norwegian Clausen , Claussen , or Klausen , and also of their Dutch cognates, such as Claassen or Klaassen, patronymics from short forms of the local equivalents of the personal name Nicholas . Compare Clauson .

nameMeanings.name: Olivier
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: IV
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Vivian   and   Vivien .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Olivier IV de Clisson was born in 1300, in Clisson, Loire-Atlantique, Pays de la Loire, France, his father, Olivier III de Clisson, was 36 and his mother, Isabelle de Craon, was 22. He married Blanche de Bouville about 1320, in Clisson, Loire-Atlantique, Pays de la Loire, France. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 2 August 1343, in Paris, Seine, France, at the age of 43.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Olivier IV de Clisson est né en 1300, à Clisson, Loire-Atlantique, Pays de la Loire, France, son père, Olivier III de Clisson, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Isabelle de Craon, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Blanche de Bouville environ 1320, à Clisson, Loire-Atlantique, Pays de la Loire, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 2 août 1343, à Paris, Seine, France, à l’âge de 43 ans.

Er hat um 1320 in Clisson, Loire-Atlantique, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich Blanche de Bouville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 2. August 1343 im Alter von 43 Jahren in Paris, Seine, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Olivier IV de Clisson è nato il nel 1300 nel Clisson, Loire-Atlantique, Pays de la Loire, Francia, il suo padre, Olivier III de Clisson, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Isabelle de Craon, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Blanche de Bouville circa 1320, nel Clisson, Loire-Atlantique, Pays de la Loire, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 2 agosto 1343, nel Paris, Seine, Francia, all'età di 43 anni.

ja.Blain, Châteaubriant, Loire-Atlantique,: フランスペイズ ド ラ ロイアーロイアーエ-アトランティクチaテアウブリアントブレイン

ja.Clisson, Loire-Atlantique, Pays de la Lo: フランスペイズ ド ラ ロイアーロイアーエ-アトランティククリソン
ja.lifeSummary: Olivier IV de Clissonが1300年にフランスペイズ ド ラ ロイアーロイアーエ-アトランティククリソンで生まれた時，父Olivier III de Clissonは36歳，母Isabelle de Craonは22歳であった。約1320年にフランスペイズ ド ラ ロイアーロイアーエ-アトランティククリソンでBlanche de Bouvilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1343年8月2日にフランスセアインパーイスで43歳で死去した。

ko.Blain, Châteaubriant, Loire-Atlantique,: 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 로이레-앳랜티크 cha테오브리아트 블린

ko.lifeSummary: Olivier IV de Clisson(이)가 1300년 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 로이레-앳랜티크 클리슨에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Olivier III de Clisson(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabelle de Craon(은)는 22세였다. 그는 대략 1320년 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 로이레-앳랜티크 클리슨에서 Blanche de Bouville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1343년 8월 2일 프랑스 세이인 파리스에서 43세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Olivier IV de Clisson nasceu em 1300, em Clisson, Loire-Atlantique, Pays de la Loire, França, seu pai, Olivier III de Clisson, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Isabelle de Craon, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Blanche de Bouville aproximadamente 1320, em Clisson, Loire-Atlantique, Pays de la Loire, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 2 de agosto de 1343, em Paris, Seine, França, com 43 anos.

ru.Clisson, Loire-Atlantique, Pays de la Lo: клиссон, лоире-атлантику, пеис де ла лоир, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Olivier IV de Clisson родился в 1300 г. в местности клиссон, лоире-атлантику, пеис де ла лоир, Франция, его отцу по имени Olivier III de Clisson было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabelle de Craon, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Blanche de Bouville около 1320 г. в местности клиссон, лоире-атлантику, пеис де ла лоир, Франция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 2 августа 1343 г. в местности пэрис, син, Франция в возрасте 43 лет.

Se casó con Blanche de Bouville aproximadamente 1320, en Clisson, Loire-Atlantique, Pays de la Loire, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 2 de agosto de 1343, en Paris, Seine, Francia, a la edad de 43 años.
